title: Incorrect naming in Binary to Base64 node
symptom: The workflow fails with a JSON code error when trying to post media. This occurs due to incorrect naming in a previous node.
not_this_if: Error is unrelated to media posting
No Binary to Base64 node is used
root_cause: The error occurs because the naming convention used in the Binary to Base64 node does not match what is expected in the subsequent node that posts the image. This mismatch leads to incorrect data being passed along the workflow.
fix_steps: Open the Binary to Base64 node settings
Ensure the naming matches what is expected in the next node
Test the workflow again to confirm the issue is resolved
agent_instruction: Check and correct the naming in the Binary to Base64 node to match the expected input for the next node.
